compiled_state.title: Add scaffold-route registry entries (Flask + NextJS) and update registry test
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add scaffold-route entries for Flask and NextJS to recipes/recipe-registry.yaml. Update test-recipe-registry.sh to assert these entries exist.

### Registry entries to add:
```yaml
- name: scaffold-route
  language: python
  framework: flask
  engine: scaffold
  adapter: scaffold-adapter.sh
  recipe_type: generative
  capability_description: "Generate Flask route boilerplate (blueprint, view function, Jinja2 template) for a named route"
  scope: single-file
  min_engine_version: "1.0.0"
  installation_instructions: "No engine installation required — uses bash templates"

- name: scaffold-route
  language: typescript
  framework: nextjs
  engine: scaffold
  adapter: scaffold-adapter.sh
  recipe_type: generative
  capability_description: "Generate NextJS route boilerplate (page component, API route handler) for a named route"
  scope: single-file
  min_engine_version: "1.0.0"
  installation_instructions: "No engine installation required — uses bash templates"
```

Note: registry schema may need a `framework` field added. If so, update recipes/schemas/recipe-registry-schema.json to add optional `framework` string field.

### Test update:
Update tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh to add:
- test_registry_has_scaffold_route_flask: asserts Flask scaffold-route entry exists
- test_registry_has_scaffold_route_nextjs: asserts NextJS scaffold-route entry exists

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] recipe-registry.yaml contains Flask scaffold-route entry
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); assert any(e.get('name')=='scaffold-route' and e.get('language')=='python' for e in r['recipes'])"
- [ ] recipe-registry.yaml contains NextJS scaffold-route entry
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); assert any(e.get('name')=='scaffold-route' and e.get('language')=='typescript' for e in r['recipes'])"
- [ ] All entries pass schema validation
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml,json,jsonschema; schema=json.load(open('recipes/schemas/recipe-registry-schema.json')); r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); [jsonschema.validate(e,schema) for e in r['recipes']]"
- [ ] test-recipe-registry.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh
